chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln No.807 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 25.08.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- It appears on perusal of the orders passed by this Court that the applicant was called absent on 24.06.2025, 18.08.2025 and is again called absent today. No intimation is received. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
